# Susea

> Susea is the AI pricing and procurement operating system for ocean freight forwarders. Instant spot rates across 200+ carriers, live RFQ auctions, and branded customer quotes in under 90 seconds.

## Blog

- [Spot Rate vs Contract Rate in Ocean Freight: When to Use Each](https://susea.ai/blog/spot-rate-vs-contract-rate): Spot rates vs contract rates in ocean freight — what the difference is, when to quote each, and how to manage both on your pricing desk.
- [Building a Pricing Desk from Scratch: The Modern Freight Forwarder's Guide](https://susea.ai/blog/building-pricing-desk-freight-forwarder): How to build a freight pricing desk that scales — roles, tooling, rate management, margin controls, and the playbook from 0 to 500 TEU per month.
- [How to Automate Freight Surcharge Calculations Without Excel](https://susea.ai/blog/automate-freight-surcharge-calculations): Freight surcharge calculations are still done manually in Excel at most forwarders. Here is a step-by-step approach to automating them correctly.
- [Why Your Freight Quotes Take 18 Minutes — and How to Fix It](https://susea.ai/blog/why-freight-quotes-take-18-minutes): 18 minutes is the industry average for a manually assembled freight quote. Here is exactly where the time goes and how to cut it to 90 seconds.
- [The Ocean Freight Quotation Workflow: Enquiry to Customer Quote](https://susea.ai/blog/ocean-freight-quotation-workflow): From the moment a cargo enquiry arrives to the moment a customer quote goes out — the exact steps, the time each takes, and where the workflow breaks.
- [The India EXIM Freight Forwarder's Pricing Stack: Tools, Workflow and Best Practices](https://susea.ai/blog/india-freight-forwarding-software): The tools, workflow, and best practices for a modern India EXIM freight forwarder's pricing desk — from rate ingestion to customer quote delivery.
- [How Freight Rate Volatility Kills Your Pricing Desk's Margins](https://susea.ai/blog/freight-rate-volatility): Ocean freight rates can move by 30–50% in a quarter. Here is how rate volatility directly compresses margins on your pricing desk — and what to do about it.
- [Top Ocean Carriers on India Trade Lanes: MSC, Maersk, CMA CGM, Evergreen Compared](https://susea.ai/blog/ocean-carriers-india): Comparing the top ocean carriers on India trade lanes — MSC, Maersk, CMA CGM, Hapag-Lloyd, Evergreen — on rates, transit times, free time, and reliability.
- [India to Europe Freight: INNSA / INMUN → NLRTM Trade Lane Deep Dive](https://susea.ai/blog/india-europe-ocean-freight): Complete trade lane guide for India–Europe ocean freight: rates, transit times, carriers, Suez vs Cape routing, and how to quote this corridor correctly.
- [India to UAE Ocean Freight: INNSA → AEJEA Rates, Carriers & Transit](https://susea.ai/blog/india-uae-freight-rates): Complete guide to India–UAE ocean freight: current rates, top carriers, transit times, surcharges, and how to get the best FCL quote on INNSA → AEJEA.
- [Why Ocean Freight Pricing Still Lives in Email (And the Fix)](https://susea.ai/blog/ocean-freight-pricing-email): Freight pricing runs on email threads, Excel attachments, and WhatsApp groups. Here is why the problem persists and what a modern stack looks like.
- [Generative AI for Freight Forwarders: 5 Use Cases in 2026](https://susea.ai/blog/generative-ai-freight-forwarders): Generative AI is useful in exactly five places for a freight forwarder's pricing desk. Here is what works, with specific examples.
- [From WhatsApp to Customer Quote: AI Freight Rate Extraction](https://susea.ai/blog/whatsapp-to-customer-quote): Carrier rates arrive on WhatsApp. AI reads them, applies surcharges, and generates a branded customer quote in 90 seconds. Here is the exact workflow.
- [GRI, PSS, EBS: How Surcharge Announcements Affect Your Margins](https://susea.ai/blog/gri-pss-ebs-surcharge-announcements): GRI, PSS, and EBS announcements move freight costs by $100–$500/TEU overnight. Here is how to track them and protect your pricing desk's margins.
- [How AI Reads Carrier Rate Sheets Better Than Your Pricing Team](https://susea.ai/blog/ai-reads-carrier-rate-sheets): AI tariff extraction processes PDF, Excel, email, and WhatsApp rate sheets in under 30 seconds. Here is how it works and what it gets right.
- [How to Read a Carrier Rate Sheet — and Why It's Hard](https://susea.ai/blog/how-to-read-carrier-rate-sheet): Carrier rate sheets arrive as PDFs, Excel files, and WhatsApp forwards. Here is how to parse them correctly before you quote a customer.
- [AI in Ocean Freight Pricing: What's Real and What Actually Works](https://susea.ai/blog/ai-ocean-freight-pricing): AI promises to transform freight pricing. Here is what is actually working for freight forwarders in 2026 — and what is still hype.
- [What is a NVOCC? How They Differ from Freight Forwarders](https://susea.ai/blog/what-is-nvocc): NVOCC vs freight forwarder — the legal distinction, how each prices freight, and why it matters for your margins and compliance.
- [FCL vs LCL: How to Choose, Quote and Price the Right Mode](https://susea.ai/blog/fcl-vs-lcl): FCL or LCL? The decision affects transit time, cost, and quoting complexity. Here is how to evaluate and price both correctly.
- [Ocean Freight Surcharges Explained: BAF, CAF, THC and More](https://susea.ai/blog/ocean-freight-surcharges-explained): BAF, CAF, THC, LSS, ISPS — what every surcharge means, how it is calculated, and why most freight quotes get them wrong.
